scripts.deploy:presigner: zip -j tmp.zip backend/presigner/index.mjs && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name ImageMinifierPresigner --zip-file fileb://tmp.zip && rm tmp.zip
scripts.deploy:processor: zip -j tmp.zip backend/processor/index.mjs && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name ImageMinifierL --zip-file fileb://tmp.zip && rm tmp.zip
